sentences.english: I try to recycle as much as possible.
Plastic, paper, glass — I sort everything into different bins.
sentences.korean: 플라스틱 종이 유리 — 다른 통에 다 분리해요.

sentences.english: In my country, recycling isn't very common yet.
There aren't enough recycling bins or programs.
I recently started composting, and it's made a huge difference in how much trash I produce.
sentences.korean: 최근에 퇴비 만들기를 시작했고 쓰레기 양에 큰 변화가 생겼어요.
